channel.title: Keyword Search on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Keyword Search on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: BM25 full-text search in Azure HorizonDB
item.description:
BM25 full-text search is now in public preview for Azure HorizonDB. The feature provides production-style keyword search with BM25 relevance ranking and runs entirely inside the database.

  • Source: Azure Updates
